'''âb-sh-z-ch''' ('''kabashzechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alchemize|alchemize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-z-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alchemize|alchemize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-sh-z-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kabashzechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibashzechoko|thibashzechoko]] || [[word:jibashzechoko|jibashzechoko]] || [[word:shibashzechoko|shibashzechoko]] || [[word:kibashzechoko|kibashzechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbashzechoko|thĂŠbashzechoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbashzechoko|jĂŠbashzechoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbashzechoko|shĂŠbashzechoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbashzechoko|kĂŠbashzechoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
